scripts.build: bun run --filter '@vectojs/math' build && bun run --filter '@vectojs/text' build && bun run --filter '@vectojs/layout' build && bun run --filter '@vectojs/animation' build && bun run --filter '@vectojs/core' build && bun run --filter '@vectojs/ui' build && bun run --filter '@vectojs/markdown' build && bun run --filter '@vectojs/three' build
scripts.lint:actions: command -v actionlint >/dev/null 2>&1 && actionlint || echo 'actionlint not installed locally; CI enforces it (rhysd/actionlint action). Skipping.'
scripts.check: bun run format:check && bun run lint && bun run lint:md && bun run lint:actions
